pages.title: Facebook Pages
pages.subtitle: Manage your connected Facebook pages and their permissions.
pages.list_description: Pages currently authorized to receive scheduled posts.
pages.connect_description: Enter your Facebook Page details manually to start scheduling.
pages.token_help: Get this from the Meta for Developers portal or Graph API Explorer.
pages.manual_description: Connect a page manually using its ID and a technical Access Token.
pages.manual_id_help: The unique numerical ID of your Facebook page.
pages.manual_token_help: Long-lived access token generated from the developer portal.
pages.manual_guide_step1: Get your **Page ID** in the "About" section of your Facebook page.
pages.manual_guide_step2: Generate a **Page Access Token** (long-lived) from the Graph API Explorer.
pages.manual_guide_step3: Ensure the token has permissions: `pages_show_list`, `pages_read_engagement`, and `pages_manage_posts`.
pages.oauth_disclaimer: By connecting, TECHUS will obtain permission to read your pages and publish content scheduled by you.
pages.manual_help_question: Don't know how to get this data?
pages.disconnect_confirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect your Facebook account? All associated pages and stats will be removed.
